title: AnnotationMessageV1
description: Wire contract v1 for ntfy payloads emitted by the paper-current.html frontend when Gonzalo highlights a paragraph. W12 validates every incoming message against this schema before enqueuing it into annotations.json.

annotation_id.description: Unique id of the annotation, e.g. UUIDv4 or ts-<random>.

para_id.description: Paragraph id within paper-current.html. Empirically parser emits ~43 main-text paragraphs for v5 CONDENSED; upper bound of 60 absorbs table splits.

selection_start.description: Character offset where the selection starts within the paragraph.

selection_end.description: Character offset where the selection ends. Must be strictly greater than selection_start.

selected_text.description: Verbatim text selected by Gonzalo (1..2000 chars).

comment.description: Free-form comment attached to the annotation (0..2000 chars).

ts.description: Browser-side ISO8601 timestamp when the annotation was created.

schema_version.description: Wire contract version. Must be the literal string 'v1'.

user_agent.description: User agent string of the browser that produced the annotation.

para_section.description: Frontend hint for the section label of the paragraph (e.g. Abstract, Results).

prior_annotations_count.description: How many annotations Gonzalo has already produced in this browser session.
